name: Bash, David Anderson
description: Dave played a prominent part in the Junior Play of '18. He is an "Organic Specialist." Formerly of Hannibal, Mo., but now divides his time between St. Louis and Rolla.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Dave played a prominent part in the Junior Play of '18. He is an "Organic Specialist." Formerly of Hannibal, Mo., but now divides his time between St. Louis and Rolla.

name: Benton, Louis Brent
description: Specialized in Geology to avoid Metallurgy Laboratory. Amuses himself and works hardships on his listeners by playing the mandolin and telling funny (?) jokes. "Luke" made several attempts at raising a "misplaced eyebrow," but gave up when he found that he was of the Mexican Hairless type. The following question has never been answered: Is "Lucious" an inspector of County Fairs?
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Specialized in Geology to avoid Metallurgy Laboratory. Amuses himself and works hardships on his listeners by playing the mandolin and telling funny (?) jokes. "Luke" made several attempts at raising a "misplaced eyebrow," but gave up when he found that he was of the Mexican Hairless type. The following question has never been answered: Is "Lucious" an inspector of County Fairs?

name: Bohart, Phillip Harris
description: Hails from the "Lone Star" State, and made quite a reputation as an orator while in the S. A. T. C. Refused to be a Junior (particulars unnecessary). Often tells of his experiences as a "cow-puncher." Was president of Freshmen Class, and made "M" in football '16.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from the "Lone Star" State, and made quite a reputation as an orator while in the S. A. T. C. Refused to be a Junior (particulars unnecessary). Often tells of his experiences as a "cow-puncher." Was president of Freshmen Class, and made "M" in football '16.

name: Brazill, Mathew Patrick, Jr.
description: Hails from St. Louis. He is noted for causing "rough-house," and is in for anything that resembles a scrap. He was our dependable punter on the '15 and '16 football team and a speed demon of our track team in '16 and '17. He joined the army in the spring of '17 and was commissioned First Lieutenant Engineers.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from St. Louis. He is noted for causing "rough-house," and is in for anything that resembles a scrap. He was our dependable punter on the '15 and '16 football team and a speed demon of our track team in '16 and '17. He joined the army in the spring of '17 and was commissioned First Lieutenant Engineers.

name: Crawford, Thomas R.
description: Hails from the "Sunflower" State. Looks forward to Saturday nights and April twenty-sixth. He came to us from the Kansas School of Mines, but does not uphold the traditions of the State.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from the "Sunflower" State. Looks forward to Saturday nights and April twenty-sixth. He came to us from the Kansas School of Mines, but does not uphold the traditions of the State.

name: Deckmeyer, Fred August
description: "Deck's" favorite "hangouts" are the stage and Mechanical Hall. Always takes keen interest in school theatricals. He may have been seen without a smile, but it is not on record. Spends most of his time trying to think of something funny to say.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Deck's" favorite "hangouts" are the stage and Mechanical Hall. Always takes keen interest in school theatricals. He may have been seen without a smile, but it is not on record. Spends most of his time trying to think of something funny to say.

name: Dowd, Raymond John Thomas
description: Like the "cow-puncher," adopted a fourth year custom as soon as the Seniors began to leave town last year and showed his courage when "little" Starkey protested. He made "M" in baseball and football.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Like the "cow-puncher," adopted a fourth year custom as soon as the Seniors began to leave town last year and showed his courage when "little" Starkey protested. He made "M" in baseball and football.

name: Gill, James Pressley
description: It is a "toss up" as to whether "Jimmie" is a student or a faculty member this year. Takes delight in worrying the Juniors about the four things a good fusion should do. He has the reputation of being the most extensive second-hand dealer in Rolla and the most consistent and impartial "fusser" in school.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: It is a "toss up" as to whether "Jimmie" is a student or a faculty member this year. Takes delight in worrying the Juniors about the four things a good fusion should do. He has the reputation of being the most extensive second-hand dealer in Rolla and the most consistent and impartial "fusser" in school.

name: Howendobler, John Leslie
description: "Coal Oil Johnnie" hails from Oklahoma, but we could overlook this if he had no other faults. Besides memorizing the "Tulsa World," he is quite a "rock-hound" and electioneer, as proved by the Athletic Association election, when he was nominated and elected vice-president in less than five seconds. He has been known to bet twenty cents on four aces.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Coal Oil Johnnie" hails from Oklahoma, but we could overlook this if he had no other faults. Besides memorizing the "Tulsa World," he is quite a "rock-hound" and electioneer, as proved by the Athletic Association election, when he was nominated and elected vice-president in less than five seconds. He has been known to bet twenty cents on four aces.

name: Krause, Frederick Arthur
description: A typical product of St. Louis. His studies very seldom interfere with any of his plans. Receives new nicknames on every basketball trip. Now it is "Artie". He is very proud of his uniform, but apologizes for wearing it by saying that the shoes are "so comfortable." Another one of the knights of the table.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A typical product of St. Louis. His studies very seldom interfere with any of his plans. Receives new nicknames on every basketball trip. Now it is "Artie". He is very proud of his uniform, but apologizes for wearing it by saying that the shoes are "so comfortable." Another one of the knights of the table.

name: Larsh, Napoleon Bonaparte
description: "Nap" enjoys his beauty sleep, and consequently has a horror for first hour classes. It is said that he is specializing in Freshman English. That he has done several years of research work along this line is certain. Anytime he is caught studying, it is a safe bet that it is Geology.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Nap" enjoys his beauty sleep, and consequently has a horror for first hour classes. It is said that he is specializing in Freshman English. That he has done several years of research work along this line is certain. Anytime he is caught studying, it is a safe bet that it is Geology.

name: Lottmann, Walter Frederick
description: An "ite" of the "Big City," and a shark in anything mechanical. "Tubby," as he is better known, is Dickerson's "right hand." Why? We do not know. He "fell" about two years ago and seems to have taken the frivolous art so seriously that he will not recover.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: An "ite" of the "Big City," and a shark in anything mechanical. "Tubby," as he is better known, is Dickerson's "right hand." Why? We do not know. He "fell" about two years ago and seems to have taken the frivolous art so seriously that he will not recover.

name: Moore, Fred Vail
description: He is known for wild animal hunts while in St. Louis. His nightmares are remembered by everyone, but why those straw ticks should cause him to sing is a mystery. He forgets about Geology every now and then.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He is known for wild animal hunts while in St. Louis. His nightmares are remembered by everyone, but why those straw ticks should cause him to sing is a mystery. He forgets about Geology every now and then.

name: Morris, Thomas Carson
description: He likes to "fuss" with the "four-hundred." It has been intimated that he is trying to grow a "toothbrush," but only a post-graduate course will prove it.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: He likes to "fuss" with the "four-hundred." It has been intimated that he is trying to grow a "toothbrush," but only a post-graduate course will prove it.

name: Rollamo, Benjamin Guthrie Nichols
description: Alias other nicknames withheld upon personal request, gained a wide reputation in the business world through his venture in potash. His success, however, is not attributed to genius alone, but to experience gained while treasurer of the Junior Class. His chief difficulty now is managing the business of the Rollamo.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Alias other nicknames withheld upon personal request, gained a wide reputation in the business world through his venture in potash. His success, however, is not attributed to genius alone, but to experience gained while treasurer of the Junior Class. His chief difficulty now is managing the business of the Rollamo.

name: Nolte, William John
description: Hails from St. Louis. Besides this he has two failings—memory and hair. He claims, however, that these are not due to age or any other ordinary cause. To make up for one of his deficiencies, he is cultivating a "tooth brush" with a "faintly noticeable" degree of success.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Hails from St. Louis. Besides this he has two failings—memory and hair. He claims, however, that these are not due to age or any other ordinary cause. To make up for one of his deficiencies, he is cultivating a "tooth brush" with a "faintly noticeable" degree of success.

name: Oyler, William Ellsworth
description: "Bill" maintained his good reputation in spite of the fact that he was, for three years, a member of Fred Lane's combine. He will "roll" for anything at any time. Though not generally known, it is true that "Bill" is a "fusser" of considerable merit. "M" in football '17, captain football team '18.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bill" maintained his good reputation in spite of the fact that he was, for three years, a member of Fred Lane's combine. He will "roll" for anything at any time. Though not generally known, it is true that "Bill" is a "fusser" of considerable merit. "M" in football '17, captain football team '18.

name: Petsch, Arthur Henry
description: "Duke" is the sort of fellow one has a hard time getting a line on. In other words, he is a past master at covering his tracks. He proved himself a friend in need by helping the "cow-puncher" when that worthy aroused the jealousy of the Seniors.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Duke" is the sort of fellow one has a hard time getting a line on. In other words, he is a past master at covering his tracks. He proved himself a friend in need by helping the "cow-puncher" when that worthy aroused the jealousy of the Seniors.

name: Rollamo, Charles Michael Schnaidt
description: The original "hardluck" man of the school, entered with the class of '18, but did not graduate with it because of a severe attack of sickness. He has an abundance of "pep," and is always ready to display it. During his stay here he has done things which, though not disgraceful, he prefers to have remain unpublished. Snapshots of him, too, have been withheld upon personal request.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: The original "hardluck" man of the school, entered with the class of '18, but did not graduate with it because of a severe attack of sickness. He has an abundance of "pep," and is always ready to display it. During his stay here he has done things which, though not disgraceful, he prefers to have remain unpublished. Snapshots of him, too, have been withheld upon personal request.

name: Scott, James Walter
description: A town boy who seems to be satisfied with Rolla. He is often seen with a member of the fair sex.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: A town boy who seems to be satisfied with Rolla. He is often seen with a member of the fair sex.

name: Rollamo, Vivien X. Smiley
description: Vivien "tucked" his degree away last December and left us without explaining his actions after dark, why he walks with his arms folded across his chest, or what the "X" in his name stands for. "Navy" didn't like our army, and proved himself to be the best "stahler" in the S. A. T. C.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: Vivien "tucked" his degree away last December and left us without explaining his actions after dark, why he walks with his arms folded across his chest, or what the "X" in his name stands for. "Navy" didn't like our army, and proved himself to be the best "stahler" in the S. A. T. C.

name: Weiser, Hanley
description: "Bud" Weiser, the man with the suggestive name, though of this year's class, finished last year and was not with us at all this year. "Bud" believed in traveling, but not in paying railroad fares.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: "Bud" Weiser, the man with the suggestive name, though of this year's class, finished last year and was not with us at all this year. "Bud" believed in traveling, but not in paying railroad fares.

name: Wilkinson, Paul De Lassus
clubs: Member of the Miner Board and Trowel Club
description: It is said that "Pee Dee" underwent a great change about two years ago, and the reason for this change became apparent recently when he "took unto himself a wife." Space prohibits the printing of a picture of the bridal party on this sheet. However, it may be found elsewhere in this book. He has the distinction of being the only benedict of this year's class.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
text: It is said that "Pee Dee" underwent a great change about two years ago, and the reason for this change became apparent recently when he "took unto himself a wife." Space prohibits the printing of a picture of the bridal party on this sheet. However, it may be found elsewhere in this book. He has the distinction of being the only benedict of this year's class.

name: Wilson, Kenneth Campbell
description: "Kid" came to us from Globe, Arizona, and soon realized that he was a far way from home. It did not require a great deal of imagination to originate his nickname. Though he has been with us for four years, it is still appropriate. He admits, however, that he can be serious at times. He made letters in football, baseball and basketball.
University: Missouri University of Science and Technology
